repos.author: Alishahryar1
repos.name: free-claude-code
repos.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
repos.summary: 一款让你在终端、VSCode 扩展或 Discord 中免费使用 Claude Code 的工具，支持类似 OpenClaw 的交互方式。对于想体验 AI 编程助手但不想付费的用户来说是个热门替代方案。

repos.author: huggingface
repos.name: ml-intern
repos.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
repos.summary: Hugging Face 推出的开源 ML 工程师项目，能够自主阅读论文、训练模型并部署 ML 模型。旨在让机器学习工作流更加自动化，降低 AI 开发门槛。

repos.author: google
repos.name: osv-scanner
repos.description: Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided byhttps://osv.dev
repos.summary: Google 开发的开源漏洞扫描器，基于 OSV.dev 数据库工作。支持多种编程语言和生态系统，能快速检测项目依赖中的已知漏洞，是 DevSecOps 流水线的有力补充。

repos.author: Z4nzu
repos.name: hackingtool
repos.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
repos.summary: 集成了多种渗透测试和安全审计工具的综合渗透框架，涵盖网络扫描、密码破解、Web 攻击等模块。常用于网络安全研究和合法的渗透测试场景。

repos.author: zilliztech
repos.name: claude-context
repos.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
repos.summary: Zilliz 开发的 Claude Code MCP 工具，让 AI 编程助手能以整个代码库作为上下文进行代码检索和理解。大幅提升 AI 对复杂代码库的推理和问答能力。

repos.author: open-metadata
repos.name: OpenMetadata
repos.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.
repos.summary: 一站式元数据管理平台，整合数据发现、可观测性、治理、列级血缘追踪等功能。支持与多种数据工具集成，是现代数据栈中建立统一数据目录的热门开源选择。

repos.author: PostHog
repos.name: posthog
repos.description: 🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
repos.summary: 功能完备的产品分析平台，提供产品分析、会话回放、错误追踪、特性开关、实验、A/B 测试、问卷和数据仓库等能力。定位为开源的 Mixpanel / Amplitude 替代方案，支持自托管。

repos.author: dani-garcia
repos.name: vaultwarden
repos.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs
repos.summary: Rust 编写的非官方 Bitwarden 兼容密码管理服务器，资源占用极低。完整支持 Bitwarden API，适合在树莓派或低配置机器上自建密码管理服务。

repos.author: Anil-matcha
repos.name: Open-Generative-AI
repos.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik AI, Krea AI, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
repos.summary: 无审查的开源 AI 图像和视频生成工作室，集成了 200+ 模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo 等）。完全自托管、MIT 许可、无内容过滤，是创意 AI 工具的开源替代方案。

repos.author: codecrafters-io
repos.name: build-your-own-x
repos.description: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
repos.summary: Codecrafters 出品的经典项目，通过手写实现来深入理解各种核心技术（Redis、Bittorrent、Git、Docker 等）。编程学习的绝佳实践指南，GitHub star 持续增长。
